title: cyclosorus subalpinus
intro: Cyclosorus subalpinus, also known as the Chinese ladder fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subalpinus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
